title: Homepage Hero Session
summary: Michael Donovan proposed a temporary task list for project documentation to streamline the process. He addressed Ziad Al Khatib's limited access to design tools like Adobe Express and Canva, emphasizing the importance of direct communication for resolving such issues, especially those stemming from Christina's incomplete handover. Michael provided Ziad with Strawid brand guidelines, access to necessary files and templates in the Zshare project, and encouraged creative freedom within these guidelines, alongside independent research for design inspiration. Ziad expressed feeling overwhelmed and lost, to which Michael advised a step-by-step learning approach and encouraged setting realistic expectations.

decisions.description: Implement a simple task list for project documentation temporarily.
Ziad Al Khatib will have full access to Adobe Express and Canva.
Ziad Al Khatib will communicate tool access needs directly to Michael Donovan.
Ziad Al Khatib will operate with creative freedom within Strawid brand guidelines.

actionItems.task: Create a task list for project documentation and set Ziad as default for multiple selections.
Share marketing meeting agenda, historical documents, and Strawid corporate identity brand guidelines (including white logo versions) with Ziad.
Send Michael Donovan the click path and prompt used for Gemini images.
Watch Karate Kid, Goonies, and 16 Candles tonight and report back to Michael tomorrow.
Conduct independent research on modern web trends, hero backgrounds, and gradients.
Request examples from Invado or award-winning websites from 2025 after research.
Take time to get the design dialed in to their standard and show Michael what that is.
Ensure Ziad has full admin access in Canva.
Ensure Ziad can edit the Adobe Express newsletter template.

tensions: Ziad's limited access to design tools (Adobe Express, Canva) despite previous requests.
Michael Donovan's frustration with Ziad using Gemini for images due to aspect ratio issues.
Issues stemming from Christina's incomplete handover of responsibilities (newsletter template, LinkedIn admin access).
Ziad feeling overwhelmed and lost, struggling to catch up to Michael's knowledge level.
Michael's frustration with external edits delaying important work (Viconic, Strawid homepage).
referencesToPast: Christina's incomplete handover of responsibilities regarding design tool access and templates.
Previous requests by Ziad for Adobe PDF and Illustrator access that were not fully resolved.
Michael's memory of past conversations around creative, research, and problem-solving.
Ken Haron still having unauthorized access to LinkedIn admin settings due to Christina's oversight.
References to 'several conversations leading up to this' and anchoring back to 'our first conversation'.

contributions.description: Proposed a simple task list for documenting projects instead of complex workflows.
Emphasized Ziad's need to communicate tool access issues directly for resolution.
Shared Strawid brand guidelines and stressed creative freedom within established parameters.
Shared an anecdote about a Marine Corps graphic designer's creative problem-solving saving money.
Recommended researching modern web trends, hero backgrounds, and gradients for design inspiration.
Advised Ziad to approach learning 'one bite at a time' to manage overwhelm.
Explained limited access to Adobe Express and Canva, leading to reliance on Gemini for images.
Expressed feeling overwhelmed and lost, desiring to match team's knowledge level.
Discussed tying design elements like letter spacing to brand for consistency.
Showed comprehensive set of logos and icons, emphasizing organized client presentation.
Provided Ziad full access to a tool with extensive design resources for independent research.
